---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new content for the course
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or enhancement you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves

What problem does this feature address? What need does it fulfill?

## 📋 Proposed Solution

How do you envision this feature working?

## 🎓 Who Benefits?

- [ ] Students learning the course
- [ ] Course instructors/facilitators
- [ ] Community contributors
- [ ] Other: _____

## 📚 Example or Mockup

If applicable, provide examples or mockups of what this might look like.

## 🌟 Alternatives Considered

Have you thought of alternative solutions? What are the pros/cons?

## ⚖️ Priority

How important is this feature to you?
- [ ] Critical - Blocking my learning
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve the course
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Just an idea

## 📝 Additional Context

Any other context, links, or information about the feature request.
